evals.name: biomedical-direct-topic
evals.prompt: research-init EEG-based neurofeedback for ADHD treatment in children
evals.expected_output: Session folder created under Research/ with step0_session_config.json and step1_search_queries.md. PICO framework correctly identifies children with ADHD as population, EEG neurofeedback as intervention. 5 search queries with varied strategies and rationale. Bilingual output. Checkpoint 1 presented for review.

assertions.name: session_folder_created
assertions.description: A Research/*_eeg-* folder exists with the correct naming convention

assertions.name: session_config_valid_json
assertions.description: step0_session_config.json exists and is valid JSON with session_id, topic, timestamp, current_step, and pico fields

assertions.name: pico_has_all_components
assertions.description: PICO includes population (children/ADHD), intervention (EEG/neurofeedback), comparison, outcome, setting, and timeframe

assertions.name: five_queries_with_rationale
assertions.description: Exactly 5 search queries exist, each with a strategy label and one-line rationale

assertions.name: query_diversity
assertions.description: Queries cover different strategies: core terms, synonyms/MeSH, mechanism, methodology, cross-disciplinary

assertions.name: search_queries_md_exists
assertions.description: step1_search_queries.md exists with PICO table and all queries formatted readably

assertions.name: bilingual_output
assertions.description: step1_search_queries.md contains both English and Traditional Chinese text

assertions.name: checkpoint_presented
assertions.description: The response explicitly asks the user to review and greenlight (Checkpoint 1)

evals.name: topic-recommendation-mode
evals.prompt: 最近有什麼重大的科學突破值得深入研究嗎？幫我推薦一個主題然後設定好研究架構
evals.expected_output: Claude should use WebSearch to find recent breakthroughs, suggest 2-3 topics framed as academic research questions, then after user picks one (simulate picking the first), generate full PICO + queries output.

assertions.name: websearch_used
assertions.description: WebSearch is used to find recent scientific breakthroughs

assertions.name: topics_recommended
assertions.description: 2-3 research topics are presented as academic research questions with rationale

assertions.name: session_config_created
assertions.description: step0_session_config.json is created after topic selection

assertions.name: pico_framework_complete
assertions.description: PICO framework has all components filled appropriately for the chosen topic

assertions.name: five_queries_generated
assertions.description: 5 search queries with varied strategies and rationale are generated

evals.name: non-biomedical-topic-chinese
evals.prompt: research-init 大型語言模型在程式碼自動修復的應用
evals.expected_output: PICO adapted for CS/engineering context — Population becomes 'software systems/codebases', Intervention is 'LLM-based automated program repair'. Queries should target both NLP/SE venues. Session folder and files created. Bilingual output.

assertions.name: pico_adapted_for_cs
assertions.description: PICO is adapted for non-biomedical context — population is not clinical, terms are appropriate for CS/SE

assertions.name: session_config_valid
assertions.description: step0_session_config.json is valid JSON with all required fields

assertions.name: queries_target_cs_venues
assertions.description: Search queries reference CS-relevant terms (arxiv, software engineering, program repair, LLM, etc.)

assertions.name: chinese_input_handled
assertions.description: Chinese topic input is processed correctly — query strings are in English for academic databases

assertions.name: bilingual_output
assertions.description: Both step0 and step1 files contain bilingual content

assertions.name: checkpoint_presented
assertions.description: Checkpoint 1 review is presented to user
